title.en: VEHICLES FOR USE BOTH ON RAIL AND ON ROAD; VEHICLES CAPABLE OF TRAVELLING IN OR ON DIFFERENT MEDIA, e.g. AMPHIBIOUS VEHICLES (air-cushion vehicles B60V)
Vehicles for use both on rail and on road; Conversions therefor
{with guiding elements keeping the road wheels on the rails}
with rail and road wheels on the same axle
with rail and road wheels on different axles
Amphibious vehicles, i.e. vehicles capable of travelling both on land and on water; Land vehicles capable of travelling under water
{Arrangement of propulsion or steering means on amphibious vehicles}
{Parts or details of the vehicle structure; vehicle arrangements not otherwise provided for}
{Amphibious vehicles specially adapted for particular purposes or of a particular type}
Other vehicles capable of travelling in or on different media (flying-boats or seaplanes B64C35/00)
{Off the road or amphibian vehicles adaptable for air or space transport}
convertible into aircraft (convertible aircraft B64C37/00; convertible unmanned aerial vehicle [UAV]-type aircraft, e.g. convertible into land vehicles, B64U10/70)
Methods of getting on or off the rails
using transverse wheels, endless chains, or the like, i.e. rail wheels axes orthogonal to road wheel axes
